creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port irc/kvirc-devel, can you please take a
look at

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141473

and follow up with your comments?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
It's now using GIFs instead of JPEGs. This is similar to replacing
triangular wheels with round ones.
